decisions.decision: 27-03 and 27-04 executed as parallel isolated-worktree agents (Wave 3), then merged into master with --no-ff merges
decisions.rationale: Disjoint file sets (app.html+CLAUDE.md vs MotoKey_Client.html) meant zero code-conflict risk; only .planning/STATE.md and .planning/ROADMAP.md conflicted (both agents updated tracking docs independently) and were reconciled by hand

decisions.decision: Garage Consommables tab reuses the exact old Pneus tab slot (tabDefs 2nd entry) and existing score-badge CSS classes
decisions.rationale: Minimizes UI churn, keeps nav position stable for garage users

decisions.decision: Client gauge section title capitalized 'Usure des Consommables'
decisions.rationale: Cosmetic-only, required to satisfy the frontend-structure test's case-sensitive 'Consommables' marker assertion

decisions.decision: MotoKey_Client.html upload uses raw fetch+FormData (uploadConsoPhoto), not the existing apiFetch JSON helper, and deliberately not the carte-grise CLOUDINARY_PRESET unsigned flow
decisions.rationale: First multipart pattern in this file; the unsigned Cloudinary preset flow would skip vision-stub analysis which is required for the gauge pipeline

decisions.decision: Phase verifier set VERIFICATION.md status: passed despite listing 5 human-verification items, rather than status: human_needed (which Phase 25's verifier used for a similar situation)
decisions.rationale: Verifier's own reasoning: all 5 observable truths and all required artifacts are code-verified; the flagged items are visual/prod-manual and explicitly stated as non-blocking to the phase goal. Orchestrator followed the frontmatter status field as authoritative per the execute-phase workflow routing table.

next_action: Run /gsd:discuss-phase 28 (or /gsd:plan-phase 28 directly) to start Phase 28: UI Mobile Client (jauges, lecture seule) — last phase of v1.6. No phase 28 directory exists yet (not yet planned).

Nothing is blocked or in-progress — the next session can go straight to planning Phase 28, or first walk through the 5 human_actions_pending items above if they want visual/live QA before moving on.
